_comment: Pins the Tusk PHP LSP binary version this VS Code extension bundles and is tested against. The release workflow downloads tusk-php-<os>-<arch> from https://github.com/Tusk-PHP/lsp/releases/tag/<version> (LSP tags have no leading 'v') into bin/<os>-<arch>/tusk-php and verifies each against the sha256 sums below. Fill the TODO sums from that release's checksums. Bump deliberately after compatibility testing.
